channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Rising Rates of Gun-Related Intimate Partner Violence in Canada, According to StatsCan
item.description: New research from Statistics Canada reveals a significant rise in gun-related intimate partner violence between 2010 and 2024, with the average annual rate of such incidents increasing by 58% compared...

item.title: Man sentenced to 16 months in prison for antisemitic assault and threats against Orthodox Jewish building inspector
item.description: A 48-year-old man, Shafiq Rahman, has been sentenced to 16 months' imprisonment after admitting racially aggravated common assault and using threatening and abusive language against an Orthodox Jewish...

item.title: Giants' Chaotic Season Intensifies with Logan Webb's Social Media Conflict and Team Dysfunction
item.description: The San Francisco Giants face mounting challenges as pitcher Logan Webb deletes his X account following a heated exchange with a KNBR producer after a devastating 10-0 loss to the Toronto Blue Jays. W...

item.title: President William Ruto Shares Light Moment with Young Woman, Defends Hug with Humor
item.description: President William Ruto created a viral moment after hugging a young woman at an event and jokingly defending the gesture. The incident, captured on TikTok, shows Ruto interacting with Rosemary Muthoni...

item.title: Mumbai Police Arrest 12 in Rs 1.2 Crore Fake Currency Case
item.description: The Mumbai police have successfully arrested 12 individuals involved in a major fake currency case worth Rs 1.2 crore. The operation, conducted with the help of forensic experts, led to the seizure of...

item.title: Nigeria's Ambassador Fani-Kayode Navigates South Africa's Immigration Crisis
item.description: The article discusses the appointment of Femi Fani-Kayode as Nigeria's ambassador to South Africa, tasked with resolving a diplomatic crisis fueled by anti-immigrant violence, mass evacuations, and Ni...

item.title: Sandiganbayan Denies Motion to Dismiss Estrada's Graft Case Over Flood Projects
item.description: The Sandiganbayan anti-graft court has rejected Senator Jinggoy Estrada's motion to dismiss his graft case related to alleged kickbacks from government flood control projects. In a six-page resolution...

item.title: US and Iran continue talks amid tensions
item.description: Cruz Hewitt, 17-year-old son of former tennis star Lleyton Hewitt, has advanced to the Wimbledon boys' final, marking a significant achievement in his career. The match against Dutch player Thijs Boog...

item.title: PLP Leader Martha Karua Faces Violence After Police Fail to Secure Court-Mandated School Visit
item.description: Martha Karua, leader of the People's Liberation Party (PLP), alleges she was attacked by a group of individuals while overseeing the implementation of a High Court order at Gatoto Primary School in Mu...

item.title: Madlanga Commission Continues Inquiry into Justice System Corruption
item.description: The Madlanga commission of inquiry, tasked with investigating allegations of criminality, political interference, and corruption within the criminal justice system, is currently holding witness testim...

item.title: Oyo State Students and Teachers Freed After Security Operation
item.description: A group of 46 students and teachers from Oyo State were recently rescued by Nigerian security forces after being kidnapped. The operation involved coordinated efforts between the military, police, and...

item.title: Marineland Deer Situation Under CFIA Investigation Amid Animal Removal Concerns
item.description: The article details the ongoing investigation by Canada's Food Inspection Agency (CFIA) into the relocation of deer from Marineland, a wildlife park that has faced closure and legal scrutiny. The park...

item.title: Government Increases Petrol and Diesel Prices Amid Economic Concerns
item.description: The government has raised the prices of petrol and high-speed diesel (HSD) by Rs13.18 and Rs13.80 respectively, effective from June 11. The new petrol price stands at Rs310.71 per litre, while HSD is ...

item.title: Constitutional Court Ruling Removes Procedural Barriers for Asylum Seekers in South Africa
item.description: The Constitutional Court of South Africa has ruled that parts of the country's Refugees Act are unconstitutional, removing procedural barriers that previously hindered asylum seekers from having their...

item.title: Gold Smuggling Attempt Foiled by Police at Inter-State Checkpost
item.description: The police intercepted and seized approximately 700 grams of gold during a routine vehicle check at the Walayar inter-State checkpost. The incident involved Mohammed, a 65-year-old resident of Varavoo...

item.title: Rivers State Governor Unveils N1.85trn 2026 Budget for Development
item.description: Rivers State Governor, Sir Siminalayi Fubara, has officially presented the 2026 state budget of N1.854 trillion to the Rivers State House of Assembly for approval. The budget, termed 'Budget of Resili...

item.title: Multi-storey home destroyed in Yarralumla fire
item.description: A major fire has completely destroyed a multi-storey home in Yarralumla, located in Canberra's inner south. Emergency services were called to the scene on Schomburgk Street around 7:29pm on Friday, Ju...

item.title: Political Tensions Escalate Over Land Dispute Involving Leader's Family
item.description: The article details a growing political controversy surrounding a high-profile leader's family entangled in a land dispute. The conflict has sparked widespread public protests, with allegations of cor...

item.title: Tanzania's Royal Clinic Achieves 28,000 Patient Milestone in First Year
item.description: The Royal, International Patients and Master Health Check-up Clinic at Benjamin Mkapa Hospital in Dodoma has treated over 28,000 patients in its first year, including more than 200 international clien...

item.title: Timeline of IU and Lee Jong-suk's Relationship from Colleagues to Lovers and Breakup
item.description: The article details the evolving relationship between South Korean celebrities IU (Lee Ji-eun) and Lee Jong-suk, tracing their journey from distant colleagues to lovers and eventual breakup. Their pat...
